app.title: DevStackBox
app.subtitle: PHP Development Environment
app.description: A lightweight, portable, open-source local development environment for PHP developers

mysql.title: MySQL
mysql.description: Embedded MySQL server with GUI management

updater.statusReadyToInstall: Ready to install — restart to update

vhosts.title: Virtual Hosts
vhosts.description: Manage local development domains served by Apache.
vhosts.hostsFileDesc: For "myapp.test" to resolve in a browser, add it to the Windows hosts file. This requires administrator (UAC) permission.
vhosts.confirmRemoveDesc: Remove the virtual host for {{domain}}? This does not delete the document root folder.
vhosts.uacWarning: Windows will ask for administrator permission to modify the hosts file.

services.title: Services
services.workspaceHint: Select a card to inspect logs and configuration below.

errorLog.title: Recent log activity
errorLog.description: Last few lines from the selected service log.
errorLog.browserMode: Logs are only available in the desktop app.

settings.appearanceDesc: Theme and language used across the app.
settings.themeDesc: Light, dark, or follow your system preference.
settings.startupDesc: Control whether DevStackBox launches when you sign in.
settings.autostartDesc: Adds a Windows registry entry under HKCU Run. No admin needed.
settings.previewOnlyDesc: Autostart is configured by the desktop app at runtime.
settings.updatesDesc: DevStackBox can quietly check GitHub Releases for new versions.
settings.autoCheckDesc: On launch and once every 6 hours.
settings.autoCheckHint: Takes effect on the next app launch.
settings.updateChannelDesc: Stable receives signed releases. Beta receives pre-releases.
settings.updateChannelHint: Takes effect on the next update check.
settings.servicesDesc: Automatically start selected services when DevStackBox opens. Applies on next launch.
settings.autoStartApacheDesc: Start the HTTP server when DevStackBox launches.
settings.autoStartMysqlDesc: Start the database server when DevStackBox launches.
settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep services running in the background when the window closes.

about.builtWith: Built with Tauri, React, and Rust
about.author: Author
about.systemInfoDesc: Detected runtime, host, and bundled binary versions.

toast.requiresTauri: This action requires the desktop app.

users.noUsers: No users found. Is MySQL running?
users.confirmDeleteDesc: This will permanently drop the MySQL user. This action cannot be undone.

databases.empty: No user databases yet. Create one in phpMyAdmin.

security.title: Security Analyzer
security.description: Scans PHP, Apache, and MySQL configurations for common security issues.
security.noIssuesDesc: Your PHP, Apache, and MySQL configurations look good.
security.runScanPrompt: Click "Run Scan" to analyze your service configurations.

ssl.caGenerated: Local Root CA generated (DevStackBox Local CA)
ssl.generateDesc: Creates a Local Root CA (DevStackBox Local CA) then signs a 10-year localhost certificate with it. Re-run to regenerate the localhost cert without touching the CA.
ssl.enableDesc: Adds mod_ssl and an HTTPS VirtualHost (port 443) to Apache config. Generates a certificate if one does not exist yet.
ssl.disableDesc: Removes the SSL Include from httpd.conf. Certificate files are kept so SSL can be re-enabled without regenerating.
ssl.trustTitle: Trust the Root CA in Windows (one-time)
ssl.trustDesc: Import the CA certificate once. Every certificate DevStackBox generates - for localhost and future virtual hosts - is then trusted automatically. No more browser warnings.
ssl.trustStep2: Navigate to Trusted Root Certification Authorities > Certificates.
ssl.trustStep3: Right-click and choose All Tasks > Import...
ssl.trustStep4: Browse to ca.crt (path shown below) and complete the import wizard.
ssl.trustStep5: Restart your browser. All DevStackBox HTTPS sites will be trusted without any further action.
ssl.generateFirst: Generate the CA first to see its path.

backup.includedItem1: All configuration files (httpd.conf, my.cnf, php.ini, ssl.conf, vhosts.json, phpmyadmin.conf)
backup.includedItem2: All files in your web root (www/)
backup.includedItem3: MySQL databases via mysqldump (all-databases.sql) - requires MySQL to be running
backup.binariesNote: Binaries (Apache, PHP, MySQL) are not included - they can be reinstalled.
backup.noBackups: No backups yet. Click "Create Backup" to get started.
backup.confirmRestoreDesc: This will overwrite your current configuration files and web root with the contents of {{filename}}. If MySQL data was included, all current databases will be replaced. Consider creating a fresh backup of your current state first. This cannot be undone.
backup.restoreComplete: Restore complete. Please restart services for changes to take effect.

apache.description: HTTP server serving sites from www/ on port 80.

onboarding.title: Welcome to DevStackBox
onboarding.description: A portable local PHP development environment with Apache, MySQL, and PHP 8.3 ready to go.
onboarding.callToAction: Start all services now, or explore the dashboard first.
onboarding.startedDescription: Apache and MySQL are running. Open http://localhost to see your site.

bugReport.title: Report a bug
bugReport.description: Opens a pre-filled GitHub issue. No data is sent automatically.
bugReport.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the bug or unexpected behavior

serviceManager.browserModeDesc: Service control requires running in Tauri app
serviceManager.crashDesc: {{service}} was running but is no longer responding. Check logs and restart it.
serviceManager.trayNoticeDesc: The app is minimized to the system tray. Click the tray icon to restore it.
